title: Create durable packets for AMP401 through AMP462
persona: Executive, people, finance, legal, compliance, privacy, security, engineering, data, product, and AI platform reviewers
steps: Open representative AMP401-AMP462 workspaces from the generated Assistant subnav.
Review source signals, risk assessment, recommendations, artifact, approval route, and rollback plan.
expected: Each AMP401-AMP462 workspace persists an AssistantAdvancedProgramPacket row with a distinct ampNumber and programKey.
Each packet has a domain-specific nav label, title, artifact, approval owners, and no-mutation scope.
The shared advanced-program UI displays preview metrics, packet history, review notes, and queue-review controls.

Travel plans, mobility records, payroll/equity/compensation records, board/investor/corp-dev materials, legal holds, e-discovery productions, vendor and fourth-party maps, crisis/reputation/social communications, ethics and human-rights cases, AI procurement/model inventories, synthetic data and clean-room outputs, consent and transfer records, zero trust/security controls, reliability/platform/open-source/SBOM/build/release/flag/developer/data/metrics/analytics records, executive digital twin assumptions, strategy actions, learning loops, and EOS v3 authority are not mutated automatically.

title: Queue human review for AMP401 through AMP462 packets
steps: Create or select a DRAFT packet.
Add a review note describing the downstream decision.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED and records actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
AssistantActionQueueItem uses an AMP-specific actionKind such as assistant_amp401_review or assistant_amp462_review.
AssistantAuditEvent states that downstream records were not changed automatically.

title: Executive, legal, privacy, security, engineering, data, and EOS v3 packets remain review-only
steps: Open a packet with active risk signals.
Inspect recommendationJson, approvalPlanJson, artifactJson, and rollbackPlanJson.
Queue review without executing downstream changes.
expected: recommendationJson requires review before executive, people, finance, legal, compliance, privacy, security, reliability, release, developer, data, metrics, analytics, strategy, learning-loop, or EOS v3 execution.
approvalPlanJson names the responsible owner groups.
rollbackPlanJson preserves source records and requires a fresh packet when evidence changes materially.

Autonomous recommendations cannot silently send communications, change people records, alter access, publish filings/exports, deploy releases, change metrics, modify strategy actions, self-update learning loops, or expand EOS v3 authority.
